description_long: A casually dressed adult male stands with a relaxed posture, hands resting on his hips and a slight smile on his face. He wears a button-up shirt with the sleeves rolled up to the elbows, paired with fitted trousers and dress shoes. His hair is neatly styled, short on the sides and fuller on top, giving a well-groomed appearance. The shirt is tucked into the trousers, which are secured with a visible belt. The overall look is clean and presentable, suitable for an urban or professional environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure appears to be at ease, possibly engaged in conversation or observing his surroundings.
description: A casually dressed adult male stands with hands on hips, wearing a button-up shirt, fitted trousers, and dress shoes. He has a neat, short hairstyle and a relaxed, approachable demeanor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, hands on hips, and the front of his shirt and trousers.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view highlighting the back of the shirt, trousers, and the side profile of the head.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the back of the shirt, trousers, and shoes, with both arms visible.
description_view_3: Three-quarter front view emphasizing the facial expression, chest, and the side of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted trousers, secured with a belt, and dress shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands on hips
attribute_hairstyle: short, neatly styled hair with volume on top
